{{Infobox location
| name = Great Elder tombs
| introduced = Of Kings and Killers
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] believes they must seal up the [[Great Elder tombs]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] promised to fund increased security on the [[Great Elder tombs]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Guilds]] are trying to rebuild lines into the [[Great Elder tombs]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The defenses around the [[Elder]] tombs have been weakened by the [[Guild War]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|“We have to seal up the Great Elder tombs.”<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
